summary_en: 1,500,000 shares (2.6% of shares outstanding), ¥1.5B upper limit, open-market purchase window 1 July 2026 to 31 December 2026. Rationale: enhance shareholder returns under medium-term plan 2030, reflecting stock price, financial balance, and capital structure.
title_en: Notice of Decision on Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief:
Starzen Company Limited announced on 26 May 2026 that its board of directors has approved the acquisition of up to 1,500,000 treasury shares (2.6% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) at an upper limit of ¥1.5 billion. The acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from 1 July 2026 to 31 December 2026.

The company identified enhanced shareholder returns as a core management priority under its medium-term plan 2030. The board determined that treasury acquisition is appropriate after comprehensively evaluating current stock price levels, financial balance, capital structure, and capital requirements for growth investment. The disclosure includes forward dividend guidance projecting ¥50 per share for FY27/3 with a total payout ratio of 50.5%.
